title: Malapilla
writer: Unnava Lakshminarayana, Dharma Rao Tapi, Gudipati Venkata Chalam
actors: Govindrajulu Subba Rao, Kanchanamala, Suri Babu P.
plot: The son of a priest falls in love with a Harijan girl and elopes with her. The film was a social drama that deals with untouchability prevalent in pre-independent India.
